task.name: Goal acceptance validator (DEPRECATED)
task.deprecated: Dead path — the daemon dispatches /tmux:investigate, never /tmux:validate (grep tmux:validate --include=*.go → NONE). The deterministic env/code/spec classification table that used to live here (the DETERMINISTIC ENVIRONMENT-FAILURE rule, the decision-table, GREEN OBJECTIVE CHECK, the named-contradiction SPEC-DEFECT guard, the option-presenting correction rule, and the ambiguity→validator-error rule) now lives in investigate-worker.xml step 3 (the live per-check classifier), which is the single source of truth. The C8 binding cross-reference preflight and the C1a worker-escalation relay live in investigate.xml. This alias is retained one release so any stray manual /tmux:validate invocation still parses and loads cleanly; do not extend it. Delete in a follow-up release after re-confirming no caller.
task.objective: DEPRECATED alias for /tmux:investigate. This skill no longer carries any classification logic — see investigate-worker.xml step 3 for the env/code/spec decision table and investigate.xml for the orchestrator preflights.
task.migration-safety: Defense-in-depth (E1-1b): any validation/check command that mutates the SHARED database schema (e.g. `doctrine:migrations:migrate`, `schema:update`, raw DDL) MUST be wrapped in the cross-process advisory lock: `flock .tmux-cli/db.lock -c '<cmd>'`. Per-goal worktrees isolate files but NOT the shared schema, so under MaxGoals>1 two unwrapped migrations race and corrupt version tracking. No-op cost under MaxGoals=1. (Not classification logic — an operational safety wrapper; do not extend this stub otherwise.)
